sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79800" key="pa/roulos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πάρουλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">οὖλος</foreign> B) <sense id="n79800.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">somewhat curled</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:135" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.135</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
